title: Fix: duplicate heart / stale-closure fav bug
description: initCards() captures favs Set at page-load time (stale) and also queries #modal-fav-btn by class. Fix: read fresh from localStorage on each click, exclude modal button from card query.
close_reason: Fixed: modal uses class modal-fav-btn (not fav-btn), initCards guards against empty id, reads fresh localStorage on every click

title: Fix: F1 Japanese GP not showing on dashboard
description: User reports F1 events not showing on dashboard, only MotoGP visible. Need to diagnose data/filter issue.
close_reason: Sort upcoming by dateStart before per-series cap — file was grouped by series not chronological

title: Fix EventCard session times (data-utc → data-local-time)
description: EventCard uses data-utc on <time> elements but LocalTime.astro listens for data-local-time. Session times never convert to local time. Fix the attribute name and show actual HH:MM times per session.

title: Refresh repository documentation after quality pass
description:
Scope:
- Update README, worknotes, and architecture/contributor docs affected by dependency, workflow, or quality changes.
- Remove stale claims and align commands/examples with the validated repo state.
- Note follow-up items that remain intentionally deferred.
acceptance_criteria:
- Primary docs match the actual repo commands, versions, and workflow.
- New quality/testing expectations are documented.
- Remaining known gaps are called out clearly.
notes:
Completed:
- Updated README with the current Astro major version, quality commands, and toolchain hold notes.
- Updated architecture/work notes with the new pipeline validation and test coverage.
- Updated AGENTS/CLAUDE/Copilot instructions so session quality gates reflect npm test, data validation, and build verification.
- Final verification passed: npm test, npm run validate:data, npm run build.

title: Refresh frontend and tooling dependencies
description:
Scope:
- Audit package versions in package.json and installed lock state.
- Upgrade safe frontend/tooling packages while preserving Astro/Tailwind compatibility.
- Remove clearly unnecessary packages if discovered during the audit.
- Validate with npm outdated, astro check, smoke tests, and production build.
acceptance_criteria:
- package.json reflects the chosen dependency refresh.
- npm outdated is reduced or intentionally documented.
- npm run build and npm test are re-run after changes.
- Any compatibility constraints are captured in repo docs or notes.
notes:
Completed:
- Updated Astro to 6.1.7 and @types/node to 25.6.0.
- Removed unused clean dependency.
- npm test and npm run build pass cleanly after the refresh.
- Remaining outdated packages are major-version holds: TypeScript 6 and Vite 8.
Follow-up completion:
- Added npm overrides for yaml-language-server 1.22.0 and yaml 2.8.3 in the Astro check dependency chain.
- npm audit is now clean with no remaining vulnerabilities.
- Final verification passes: npm audit, npm test, npm run validate:data, npm run build.

title: Spring 2026 quality refresh
description:
Scope:
- Refresh frontend and tooling dependencies to current compatible versions.
- Improve code quality in Astro/client and pipeline code without changing product scope.
- Strengthen validation so builds/tests catch regressions earlier.
- Update project documentation to reflect the refreshed toolchain and workflow.
acceptance_criteria:
- Compatible dependency updates are applied and validated.
- Code quality improvements land with minimal behavioral risk.
- Quality gates run successfully or failures are documented with root cause.
- Core docs are updated to match the new repo state.
notes:
Completed across child tasks:
- Refreshed safe frontend/tooling dependencies.
- Cleared Astro/frontend quality hints and dead code.
- Added Python pipeline unit tests and stronger data validation.
- Updated project docs and agent workflow docs to match the validated repo state.
Final state:
- npm audit is clean after the transitive YAML override fix.
- Full quality gate passes: npm audit, npm test, npm run validate:data, npm run build.

title: Codebase refactor: eliminate inline script duplication
description: Multiple pages contain copy-pasted inline script blocks for favorites, filtering, and time hydration. Consolidate into shared modules.

title: Codebase refactor: extract filter module
description: Filter logic duplicated between SeriesFilter.astro and calendar.astro with different implementations using same localStorage key. Extract to shared lib/filters.ts.

title: Codebase refactor: consolidate time utilities
description: Time formatting functions are scattered across time.ts, time-format.ts, and client-utils.ts with duplication. Consolidate into clear server/client split.

title: Fix weekend share card download action
description: The new dashboard PNG export control is present but not reliably downloading in-browser. Diagnose the click/download path and make it work consistently.

title: Rename SESSION_DURATION_MS in status.astro — values are minutes not milliseconds
description:
Variable SESSION_DURATION_MS in      
  status.astro holds values like 90 (race) which are in minutes not milliseconds. Future timing math using this constant will be off by 60,000x. Fix: 
  rename to SESSION_DURATION_MIN or convert values to actual milliseconds.

title: Fix build_upcoming limit parameter — dead code, never applied
description:
pipeline/transforms/gold.py build_upcoming(limit=30)    
  accepts a limit parameter but never applies it — no slicing happens. Fix: return sorted(upcoming, key=_sort_key)[:limit]

title: Restore body.style.overflow after modal close via page navigation
description:
EventModal.astro sets document.body.style.overflow =
   'hidden' when opening but never resets it if the user navigates away via back button or Astro link. The destination page has a permanently locked scroll
   body. Fix: add document.addEventListener('astro:before-swap', () => { document.body.style.overflow = ''; })

title: Fix countdown interval leak accumulating on page transitions
description: Countdown.astro calls setInterval(update, 1000) without storing the interval ID. On every astro:after-swap a new interval starts; old intervals keep running and writing to the same DOM node causing visible jitter. Fix: store intervalId, call clearInterval in astro:before-swap cleanup, and guard against double-init.

title: Fix event listener leak in EventCard on page transitions
description: In EventCard.astro initCards(), window.addEventListener('rt-favs-changed', ...) is registered on every astro:after-swap without removing the previous listener. After 5 navigations there are 5 handlers all updating the same DOM, causing sluggish fav sync. Fix: store handler reference and call removeEventListener before re-adding on each init cycle.

title: Fix F3 series color in EventModal and watchlist
description: EventModal.astro and watchlist.astro use #0090d0 (F2's color) for F3 instead of the canonical #60a5fa defined in series.ts. Users see F3 events colored as F2 in the detail modal and watchlist. Root cause: SERIES_META is duplicated in 6 locations and this copy drifted. Fix by resolving the series metadata duplication (create series-client.ts) or as a short-term patch update the color in both files.

title: Polish kiosk UI: visual enhancements, clickable sidebar, back button, awesome nav button
description: Improve /status visual appeal (glass cards, digit blocks, animated glow), make sidebar events clickable (tap to select as hero), add back-to-dashboard button in kiosk, and replace the tiny Nav kiosk link with a proper glowing live indicator button.
close_reason: Implemented: glowing kiosk nav button with pulse dot + TV icon, glass digit blocks for countdown, animated radial bg glow, scanline texture overlay, series color live-mode digit block glow, bigger flags, clickable sidebar events (tap to manually pin hero, tap again or 'Resume Auto' to release), back-to-dashboard button, manual mode badge with auto-resume after 60s

title: Implement kiosk redesign for /status page
description: Redesign the /status page into a purpose-built ambient display for TVs, bars, and waiting rooms. Three auto-switching modes (idle/weekend/live) with series color theming, large countdown, session strip, sidebar of upcoming events, and smart soft-refresh. Design spec in docs/kiosk-redesign.md.
close_reason: Implemented: two-column layout, three modes (idle/weekend/live), series color theming, large countdown with digit tick animation, session strip with past/next/future states, live mode full-screen takeover with pulse dot, also-live chips, smart soft-refresh, weekday-time format in LocalTime.astro, kiosk CSS animations in global.css

title: Fix watchlist nav badge shows 1 when 0 favorites
description: Nav fav count badge shows '1' on fresh tab open even though localStorage has 0 favorites. Root cause: stale/null entries in rt-favs array not filtered out when reading localStorage. Fix: filter(Boolean) on all localStorage reads for rt-favs.

title: Dashboard: auto-scroll to upcoming, hide day-old events
description: Hide events where dateEnd < yesterday behind a collapsible. Auto-scroll page to first upcoming section on load.
close_reason: Recent events (dateEnd < yesterday) hidden under collapsible toggle; auto-scroll to first upcoming section on page load (sessionStorage flag prevents re-scroll on every nav)

title: Add Moto2 + Moto3 series with seed files
description: moto2/moto3 not in calendar.json. Add series metadata to series.ts. Create data/seed/moto2.json and moto3.json mirroring MotoGP weekends.
close_reason: Added moto2/moto3 to series.ts (orange/yellow), generated seed files from MotoGP calendar, added to pipeline SEED_SERIES, rebuilt gold layer (now 192 events)

title: Racing-themed bold visual redesign
description: Stronger racing aesthetic: speed lines, bold typography, series color accents, checkered patterns, dramatic countdown. Keep it clean but make it POP.
close_reason: Implemented: event detail modal (EventModal.astro), favorites/watchlist page + nav badge, bold racing redesign with hero countdown + series progress grid

title: Add event detail modal/page with session schedule
description: Clicking an EventCard opens a detailed view: full session list with local times, where-to-watch/broadcast info, circuit details.
close_reason: Implemented: event detail modal (EventModal.astro), favorites/watchlist page + nav badge, bold racing redesign with hero countdown + series progress grid

title: Overhaul Dashboard layout
description: Wider layout (max-w-5xl), countdown section shows series badge + circuit name, mini stats bar per series, better section headers.
close_reason: Dashboard overhauled: wider layout, series stats bar, richer countdown with flag+circuit

title: Add country flag emoji support
description: Add countryFlag() utility (alpha-2 code → emoji flag) to src/lib/time.ts. Use in EventCard next to circuit location.

title: Fix client-side week-label refresh logic in index.astro
description: The client-side label update code around line 689-696 has the same diffDays<=7/14 bug. Must be updated together with the server-side fix.

title: Fix event categorization: use Monday week boundary instead of diffDays <= 7/14
description: getWeekLabel() in index.astro uses diffDays<=7 for 'This week' and diffDays<=14 for 'Next week', ignoring actual calendar week boundaries. Events on Monday appear in 'This week' even though a new RACEWEEK starts on Monday. Fix both the server-side getWeekLabel() and the client-side heading-refresh logic to use thisMonday/nextMonday/nextNextMonday boundaries.

title: Strengthen pipeline validation and test coverage
description:
Scope:
- Review current Python pipeline validation/test coverage.
- Add or improve lightweight checks where gaps are causing avoidable risk.
- Keep the pipeline static-data workflow fast and repo-friendly.
acceptance_criteria:
- Pipeline validation/test coverage is measurably improved.
- New checks run locally with the existing toolchain.
- No unrelated data churn is introduced.
notes:
Completed:
- Added stdlib Python unit tests for gold transforms and validation logic.
- Added npm scripts for pipeline tests and data validation.
- Tightened validation to catch gold envelope eventCount mismatches.
- Corrected the pipeline completion summary to report real event counts.

title: Improve frontend and shared utility code quality
description:
Scope:
- Review Astro pages/components and shared client utilities for low-risk quality improvements.
- Address warnings, duplication, and brittle logic that surface during validation.
- Prefer root-cause fixes over broad refactors.
acceptance_criteria:
- Quality fixes are limited in scope and behavior-preserving.
- Relevant checks pass after each fix set.
- The resulting code is simpler or more defensible than before.
notes:
Completed:
- Replaced deprecated getClientSeriesMeta usage in active code paths.
- Removed unused locals and dead helper code.
- Cleared Astro inline-script hints by marking raw JSON scripts explicitly inline.
- astro check is now fully clean.

title: Fix GT World feed/status behavior and remove cancelled MotoGP Qatar round
Fix NLS times and add GT World Challenge Europe as a seed series
description: Fix NLS event times and add GT World Challenge Europe as a seed series.

title: Codebase refactor: Python pipeline cleanup
description: Consolidate duplicated transform patterns, improve error handling consistency, extract shared constants.

title: Codebase refactor: clean up types and dead code
description: Remove unused exports, fix inconsistent type usage, consolidate window globals into __rt namespace, clean dead code paths.

title: Principal refactor pass across frontend and pipeline
description: Perform a focused repository-wide refactor pass to improve code structure, remove duplication, tighten utility boundaries, and raise maintainability in both Astro frontend and Python pipeline without changing product scope.
notes: Completed focused principal refactor pass. Frontend: extracted pure time formatting helpers, introduced shared client event registry/open helpers, removed full event JSON blobs from DOM attributes across EventCard/calendar/watchlist/recap, and simplified modal deeplink resolution. Pipeline: added shared bronze-to-silver transform helpers and refactored F1, MotoGP, NASCAR, and WSBK transforms onto them. Validation: npm run build, npm test, and python compileall passed. Follow-up issues filed for cross-language session taxonomy unification and shared client event-card renderer.

title: Sync repository docs with current codebase
description: Update project and instruction docs so they match the current pages, components, libraries, series coverage, and current work status. Acceptance: core docs and worknotes reflect the repo as it exists today without speculative roadmap text.

title: Harden pipeline validation and transform consistency
description: Integrate validation into normal pipeline execution, add explicit configured-series coverage checks, and clean up lightweight typing/resource-management issues in the Python pipeline. Acceptance: validation runs during the pipeline and targeted cleanup changes preserve existing workflows.

title: Tighten Astro data typing and utility usage
description: Replace avoidable any-casts in frontend pages, remove redundant local helper copies, and standardize shared utility usage without broad rewrites. Acceptance: targeted pages use shared types and duplicate helpers are removed while build/tests stay green.

title: Consolidate shared frontend session and series metadata
description:
Repository-wide cleanup task for duplicated frontend metadata and fallback logic.

Scope:
- Consolidate session duration maps into a single shared source used by dashboard, status, timeline, ICS, and client helpers
- Remove duplicated series fallback objects by adding a shared fallback helper
- Clean up stale comments and mixed import patterns around shared client/server utilities

Acceptance Criteria:
- Session duration data has one canonical definition
- Series fallback metadata is created in one shared place
- Frontend build and tests still pass

title: Fix dense day share-card overflow
description: Selected-day PNG exports can overflow when too many events or session rows are present. Make the renderer adapt gracefully so dense cards stay legible and fit within the 9:16 canvas.

title: Add share-card export to calendar day selection
description: Expose the PNG share-card export from the calendar page for a user-selected day and support a lightweight multi-day selection workflow if it fits the existing date picker interaction.

title: Fix one-event weekend share card layout
description: The weekend share image over-expands when only one event is present. Adjust the canvas layout so single-event cards keep balanced proportions.

title: Tone down weekend share card dashboard UI
description: Reduce the dashboard footprint of the weekend share-card feature and present it as a lighter optional action rather than a large feature panel.

title: Enhance ICS exports with emojis and broadcast descriptions
description: Improve client-side ICS export so event titles are more scannable in calendar apps and include richer metadata from broadcasts.json. Update single-event, series, and watchlist exports through the shared helper.

title: Add weekend share card PNG export
description: Add a client-side share card for This Weekend in Racing that renders upcoming weekend sessions to canvas and downloads a story-sized PNG from the dashboard.

title: Upgrade all npm dependencies to latest versions
description: All major dependencies are behind: astro 5→6, typescript 5→6, @types/node 22→25, plus all other packages. Upgrade everything and verify build still works.
close_reason: All packages upgraded to latest. Build verified (36 pages). picomatch CVE fixed. yaml CVE in @astrojs/check chain is upstream/unfixable without downgrade.

title: Series Heatmap
description: GitHub-style contribution heatmap on /calendar. Day squares colored by session density. Hover for details.

title: Sleep Calculator
description: Badge on session rows showing local time verdict: prime time, late night, rough one. Color-coded green/amber/red.

title: Clash Detector
description: Clash badge on calendar when 3+ series share a weekend. Clashes section on dashboard. Build-time overlap computation.

title: Season Stats Dashboard
description: Total events, events so far vs coming, busiest month/weekend, countries visited. All build-time computed from calendar.json.

title: Live Session Indicator
description: Green pulsing LIVE badge on cards during active sessions. Countdown flips to IN PROGRESS. Estimated durations per session type.

title: PWA + Home Screen Install
description: manifest.json, service worker for offline caching, install prompt, standalone display, offline banner.

title: ICS Calendar Export
description: Add to calendar button on EventModal, export watchlist on /watchlist, per-series subscribe on series pages. Pure client-side .ics generation.

title: F1 Season Flight Animation on Passport Globe
description:
Add an animated flight path feature to the Passport globe page that visualizes the F1 season journey:

- When F1 filter is active (or as a toggle), animate a 'plane' or arc trail flying between consecutive F1 race circuits in calendar order
- Show the trail progressing from completed races through to the next upcoming race
- Use great-circle arcs between circuit coordinates for realistic flight paths
- The arc should animate smoothly with a glowing trail effect
- Past segments should remain visible (dimmer), current flight segment pulses
- Optional: add a small plane/chevron icon at the animation head
- Keep animation performant within the existing Canvas 2D render loop
- Consider extending to other series as well (toggle per series)

Technical notes:
- All F1 circuit coordinates are available in calendar.json
- Great circle interpolation: use spherical linear interpolation (slerp)
- Animation state: track progress 0-1 along the route, advance each frame
- Integrate with existing render() loop, don't create separate animation

title: Add missing lat/lng coordinates for MotoGP, Moto2, Moto3, and NASCAR circuits
description: 106 events across 50 unique circuits are missing lat/lng coordinates in the data. Series affected: MotoGP (22), Moto2 (22), Moto3 (22), NASCAR (40). All other series (F1, F2, F3, FE, IndyCar, WEC, IMSA, DTM, NLS, WSBK, Super Formula) have complete coordinates. Fix by adding coordinates to the pipeline transforms (motogp.py, nascar.py) or the seed data.

title: Add concurrency guard to fetch-data.yml CI workflow
Fix incomplete HTML sanitization in calendar and watchlist innerHTML injection
description:
calendar.astro and watchlist.astro 
  inject events via client-side innerHTML with only single-quote escaping. Event names with double-quotes or < > from external APIs could escape the       
  attribute. Bypasses Astro server-side escaping. Fix: use element.dataset assignment or a proper HTML escape utility.

title: Move _to_iso and _to_date helpers to pipeline/utils.py
description: The datetime normalization helpers _to_iso() and _to_date() are copy-pasted identically across pipeline/transforms/motogp.py, nascar.py, and wsbk.py. If a timezone edge case is fixed in one file the others will not be updated. Fix: move both functions to pipeline/utils.py and import from there in all three transforms.

title: Move SESSION_ABBR to shared lib — duplicated in 4 files with divergent values
description: SESSION_ABBR lookup table is independently defined in EventCard.astro, EventModal.astro, calendar.astro, and watchlist.astro. Values differ: Sprint Qualifying maps to 'SQ' in EventCard but the full string 'Sprint Qualifying' in the modal. Watchlist is missing Sprint entries entirely. Fix: move to src/lib/sessions.ts as an exported constant and import everywhere.

title: Replace all any[] data casts with typed RaceEvent interface
description: Every page that imports JSON data does: const upcoming = upcomingData as any[]. This gives zero TypeScript safety — no editor autocomplete, no compile-time errors when schema changes. Fix: create src/lib/types.ts with RaceEvent, Session, SeriesMeta interfaces matching the gold layer schema. Replace all any[] casts with RaceEvent[] throughout pages.

title: Consolidate SERIES_META from 6 files into shared series-client.ts
description: Series color/label metadata is independently defined in 6 locations: series.ts (canonical), EventModal.astro, calendar.astro, watchlist.astro, status.astro, global.css. The copies have divergent coverage — calendar/watchlist are missing imsa/dtm/nls/wsbk/superformula/moto2/moto3 — and at least one color bug (F3). Adding a new series requires updating 5 files manually. Fix: create src/lib/series-client.ts as a plain TS module (no Astro frontmatter), migrate all client-side SERIES_META copies to import from it.

title: Verify IMSA 2026 seed data
description: IMSA website returns 403 on all URL attempts. Current 11-round seed in data/seed/imsa.json follows historical pattern but has NOT been verified against the official 2026 IMSA calendar. Need to manually fetch calendar HTML from imsa.com or motorsport-reference.com and confirm rounds, circuits, and dates.
close_reason: Updated imsa.json: fixed Daytona start date, Sebring dates (Mar 18-21), Long Beach end date, replaced Mid-Ohio with Laguna Seca (Round 4), fixed Detroit end date, fixed Watkins Glen end date (Jun 28), replaced Lime Rock with Canadian Tire Motorsport Park (Round 7), updated Road America dates to Jul 30-Aug 2 as 6-hour endurance, replaced September Laguna Seca with Indianapolis Motor Speedway (Round 10), fixed Petit Le Mans start date. Rebuilt gold data (239 events).

title: Mobile UX improvements: nav, kiosk, back-to-top, overflow fix
description: Several mobile UX issues reported: 1) Horizontal scroll on mobile (no overflow-x hidden, nav items overflow). 2) Nav doesn't fit on small screens — all items in one row. 3) Kiosk countdown overflows on mobile (min-w-[60px] × 4 + colons exceeds 327px available). 4) No back-to-top button when scrolling far down. 5) Series dropdown in nav is hover-only (doesn't work on touch).

title: Pipeline wiring: register all 5 new series in run.py and config.py
description: Add imsa, dtm, nls, wsbk, superformula to SEED_SERIES list in run.py and SERIES_IDS in config.py. Wire wsbk as API_SERIES if fetcher works.

title: Seed data: Super Formula 2026 calendar
description: Create data/seed/superformula.json with 2026 Super Formula Championship rounds in silver-layer format.

title: WSBK: Pulselive API fetcher + transform
description: Create pipeline/fetchers/wsbk.py and pipeline/transforms/wsbk.py using the WorldSBK Pulselive API (same pattern as MotoGP). Falls back to seed if API unavailable.

title: Seed data: NLS 2026 calendar
description: Create data/seed/nls.json with 2026 Nürburgring-Langstrecken-Serie rounds in silver-layer format.

title: Seed data: DTM 2026 calendar
description: Create data/seed/dtm.json with 2026 DTM rounds in silver-layer format.

title: Seed data: IMSA 2026 calendar
description: Create data/seed/imsa.json with 2026 IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship rounds in silver-layer format.

title: Series metadata: add IMSA, DTM, NLS, WSBK, Super Formula to series.ts
description: Add SeriesMeta entries to SERIES map and update SERIES_LIST. Colors, labels, order, category for all 5 new series.

title: Add 5 new series: IMSA, DTM, NLS, WSBK, Super Formula
description: Extend the tracker with 5 new motorsport series. Each needs: series metadata in series.ts, seed data JSON (or API fetcher for WSBK), pipeline wiring in run.py and config.py.

title: Redesign filter system with category support and persistence
description: Replace the current flat series filter with a 2-tier system: category row (All/4-Wheel/2-Wheel) + individual series chips. Add localStorage persistence so filters survive page loads. Sync filter state across dashboard and calendar via rt-filters-changed event. Add category field to SeriesMeta.

title: Flashy README with badges, Claude promo, and slash commands
description: Public repo needs a more polished README with shields.io badges, a Claude Code section, and project-specific slash commands in .claude/commands/ to help contributors get productive fast.

title: Add README.md as public repo entrypoint
description: Repo is now public. Need a compelling, well-formatted README that explains the project, why it exists, how to run it locally, and how to contribute. Should reference technical docs rather than duplicate them.

title: Add MIT license
description: Repo is now public. Need a LICENSE file so contributors and users know the terms. MIT is appropriate for an open-source fan project.

title: Redesign calendar page as monthly grid view
description: Calendar page is currently a scrollable list of EventCards duplicating the dashboard. Replace with a proper monthly calendar grid (date picker style) where: days show colored series badges, race weekends span multiple days, users can click a day to see events, month navigation prev/next. Should add genuine value over the dashboard by making temporal density visible.

title: Normalize country codes across series
description: countryFlag() only handles alpha-2 codes. NASCAR=US (alpha-2, works), other series may use alpha-3 (silent empty flag). Audit all series in pipeline transforms and normalize to alpha-2.

title: Improve mobile responsive design
description: EventCard sessions row wraps badly on small screens. Series stats grid needs better mobile layout. Nav series dropdown needs mobile-friendly toggle (currently hover-only).

title: Add broadcast/where-to-watch data and display
description: Create data/gold/broadcasts.json with NL+US+UK broadcast info per series. Display in event detail modal under 'Where to Watch' section.

title: Add favorites / watchlist with localStorage
description: Heart button on each EventCard saves to localStorage. New /watchlist page or sidebar showing saved events. Foundation for future reminders.
close_reason: Implemented: event detail modal (EventModal.astro), favorites/watchlist page + nav badge, bold racing redesign with hero countdown + series progress grid

title: Calendar: jump-to-current-month + past event greying
description: Add anchor links per month header. Add a 'Jump to today' button. Grey out past months.
close_reason: Jump-to-today button, month anchors, current month indicator, past month dimming

title: Add /series/[id] per-series pages
description: Dynamic Astro page at /series/f1, /series/motogp etc. Shows full season schedule, races done/remaining stats, all sessions.
close_reason: Created src/pages/series/[id].astro with season progress bar, next race callout, monthly event listing

title: Add past event dimming
description: Add isPastEvent() to time.ts, use in EventCard and Calendar to grey out completed events.

title: Extract shared client event-card renderer
description: Replace the remaining ad-hoc client-side event card HTML generation in watchlist and calendar detail views with a shared renderer/helper to reduce duplicate markup, styling drift, and modal wiring logic.

title: Unify session taxonomy across frontend and pipeline
description: Replace the remaining per-language session label maps with a single canonical taxonomy definition that both TypeScript UI helpers and Python transforms derive from, so session naming changes do not drift across the stack.

title: Clean remaining Astro inline-script hints
description: Follow-up cleanup for non-blocking astro check hints that remain after the repo-wide cleanup pass. Scope: decide whether to keep JSON script tags as-is or annotate them explicitly, and remove a few lingering unused helpers/props such as SeriesFilter.getCategoryIds and Layout.fullWidth if they remain dead. Acceptance: astro check hint count is reduced without changing runtime behavior.

title: Refactor duplicated client event serialization for dashboard exports
description: The dashboard share/export features need browser-safe event data and currently pages hand-roll JSON serialization patterns. Extract or normalize the approach so future client-side export features do not duplicate event shaping logic.

title: What Did I Miss Recap Roll
description: /recap page showing events from past 7 days. Spoiler-free toggle with blur. Weekend summary.

title: Countdown Sticker Widget
description: Embeddable /widget/[series] route with stripped-down countdown. URL params for customization.

title: Session Alerts - Browser Notifications
description: Remind me button on EventModal. 15/30/60min options. Browser Notification API + localStorage scheduled alerts.

title: Fix npm test to be isolatable from the Astro build
description: The test script internally calls astro build, making test runs take 30+ seconds and leaving a dist/ directory behind. There is no way to run linting or type-checking in isolation. Fix: add separate scripts — typecheck: astro check, lint: eslint src/ — and make test compose them without requiring a full build every time.

title: Pin uv version in fetch-data.yml — not latest
description: fetch-data.yml calls astral-sh/setup-uv@v5 with version: 'latest'. A breaking uv release will silently fail the nightly pipeline with no code diff to blame. Fix: pin to a specific version (e.g. 0.5.x) and update manually on a cadence.

title: Fix pyproject.toml Python version requirement from >=3.14 to >=3.11
description: pyproject.toml requires Python >=3.14 which is pre-release. Python 3.13 is the current stable. This requirement fails on most standard CI images and developer machines that have not manually installed 3.14. Fix: change to >=3.11 which is the minimum version compatible with all pipeline code, and pin the exact version in CI via uv cache configuration.

title: Remove python-dateutil dead dependency from pyproject.toml
description: python-dateutil is declared in pyproject.toml dependencies but is never imported anywhere in the pipeline/ codebase — only stdlib datetime is used. This dead dependency adds install time and unnecessary attack surface. Fix: remove python-dateutil from pyproject.toml.

title: Add Python pipeline test suite
description: The only tests are frontend smoke tests (npm test → astro build). All Python transforms, seed file loading, gold layer construction, and date normalization have zero test coverage. A malformed seed file or API shape change silently produces broken data until noticed on the frontend. Priority additions: test _normalize_time edge cases, test build_upcoming sorting and output shape, test that all seed files parse and produce valid gold output.

title: Update kiosk-redesign.md — mark completed phases as done
description: docs/kiosk-redesign.md has Phase 1-4 checkboxes that are all unchecked but status.astro clearly contains the implemented rotation logic, sidebar, and manual override behavior described in those phases. The doc was never updated after implementation. Fix: check off completed phases or add a note at the top marking the doc as historical design context.

title: Fix architecture.md schema fields that don't exist in real data
description: docs/architecture.md documents RaceEvent fields status ('upcoming'|'live'|'completed'), endTimeUTC, circuitImage, lat, lng — none of which exist in any gold or silver data file. A contributor following the docs will write code expecting these fields and get undefined silently. Fix: mark aspirational fields clearly with a [planned] tag, or remove them and re-add when implemented.

title: Consolidate isPlaceholderTime sentinel — duplicated across 5 files
description: The placeholder detection string '1900-' is independently hardcoded in: src/lib/time.ts, EventModal.astro, calendar.astro, status.astro, and watchlist.astro. isPlaceholderTime is already exported from time.ts but the 4 client-side files each re-implement the check inline. Fix: include isPlaceholderTime in the shared series-client.ts browser module and import it everywhere.

title: Fix getRaceSession fallback for multi-race format series like WSBK
description: src/lib/time.ts getRaceSession falls back to sessions[sessions.length - 1] when no session matches ['Race', 'Feature Race']. For WSBK this returns the last session which may be 'Race 2' or 'Superpole Race'. For countdown hero and next-race calculations WSBK and endurance events need an explicit main-session designation. Fix: extend the match list or add a mainSession flag to the seed data schema.

title: Fix timezone-sensitive date parsing at build time in formatDateRange and series page
description: src/lib/time.ts formatDateRange and src/pages/series/[id].astro both use new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00') which constructs a local-midnight Date. On a CI runner in UTC+0 this is fine but on a developer machine in UTC+2 an event on 2026-03-01 parses as 2026-02-28T22:00:00Z and may group under February. Fix: use 'T12:00:00Z' (UTC noon) for date-only strings used purely for display grouping.

title: Remove dead textClass and bgClass fields from SeriesMeta
description: SeriesMeta interface has textClass and bgClass Tailwind class-name fields set for all 15 series, but they are never read by any component at runtime. CLAUDE.md correctly notes dynamic Tailwind class names don't work in v4 — all components use inline style= with the hex color instead. These fields create a false affordance. Fix: remove textClass and bgClass from SeriesMeta interface and all 15 series definitions.

title: Fix getSeriesMeta fallback missing category field
description: In src/lib/series.ts the fallback object returned by getSeriesMeta for unknown series IDs is missing the category field, making it structurally invalid against the SeriesMeta type. Any component rendering based on category (e.g. the series filter) will silently receive undefined for unknown series. Fix: add category to the fallback or narrow the return type.

title: Create user persona documents for RaceTrack
description: Document 3-4 default user personas to guide design decisions. Personas should capture: motorsport interest level, device usage, what info they care about, how they use the dashboard. Store in docs/personas/.

title: Status page: auto-rotation between upcoming races
description: Kiosk /status should cycle through next 5 races on an interval instead of only showing the next one.
close_reason: Added auto-rotation through next 5 upcoming races every 20s. Pauses during live sessions and manual overrides. Added rotation dot indicator in hero showing current position. rotationEvents/rotationIndex state, renderRotationDots(), updateRotationEvents() added to status.astro.

title: Consolidate bronze git staging — exclude bronze from fetch-data.yml commits
description: fetch-data.yml stages all of data/ including the bronze cache layer (raw API responses). F1 bronze is already 3 files per season run; over multiple seasons this silently inflates git history. Bronze is a cache and should not be version controlled. Fix: change git add data/ to git add data/silver/ data/gold/ and add data/bronze/ to .gitignore.

title: Add pipeline/validate.py for data quality gates
description: No automated data quality validation exists. An agent or human updating seed files can introduce schema errors that only surface at build time or visually in the browser. Create pipeline/validate.py that: loads each silver and gold file, checks required fields against a schema, validates date formats and country codes (alpha-2 only), validates series IDs against SERIES_LIST, reports warnings for placeholder times. Run in fetch-data.yml before the git commit.

title: Optimize calendar.astro client-side render — memoize per-month event index
description: calendar.astro renderMonth rebuilds the full grid via innerHTML on every month navigation, running ~5250 date comparisons per click (150 events x 35 cells). Fine at current scale but will degrade on low-end devices as data grows. Fix: at load time build a Map<string, Event[]> keyed by ISO date string and look up O(1) per cell instead of scanning all events per cell.

title: Investigate adding full session data to MotoGP API fetcher
description: MotoGP API transform currently produces only one session per event (race day only). Moto2 and Moto3 use seed files with full Friday-Sunday session breakdowns. At events like MotoGP Jerez, MotoGP shows one session dot while Moto2 (same venue, same weekend) shows five — inconsistent. The Pulselive session endpoint for MotoGP is documented in docs/data-sources/motogp.md. Investigate and implement full session retrieval.

title: Fix CLAUDE.md upcoming.json sort order documentation — it is wrong
description: CLAUDE.md states: 'upcoming.json is sorted by series, not by date'. The actual build_upcoming in gold.py calls .sort(key=_sort_key) which sorts chronologically by dateStart — the opposite of what is documented. This misleads developers implementing dashboard features. Fix: update CLAUDE.md to: 'upcoming.json is sorted chronologically by dateStart.'

title: Remove unused TypeScript path aliases from tsconfig.json
description: tsconfig.json configures @/* and @data/* path aliases but all source files use relative imports (../../data/gold/...). The aliases are never used. This creates confusion about the intended import style. Fix: either adopt the aliases project-wide with a codemod, or remove them from tsconfig to avoid the ambiguity.

title: Add metadata envelope to gold layer JSON files
description: upcoming.json and calendar.json are bare JSON arrays with no metadata. Adding a wrapper would enable: cache invalidation, freshness checks, agent consumption context. Proposed format: { generated: ISO timestamp, season: int, event_count: int, sources: string[], events: [...] }. Update gold.py build functions and all frontend imports accordingly.

title: Add JSON Schema validation for seed files in data/seed/
description: Seed files are the primary data source for 10 of 15 series with no machine-readable schema, no validation script, and no CI check. A trailing space in countryCode, a missing sessions key, or a mistyped date format silently produces broken frontend behavior. Fix: add data/seed/schema.json, create pipeline/validate_seeds.py, and add a validation step in fetch-data.yml before the git commit step.

title: Fix placeholder site URL in astro.config.mjs
description: astro.config.mjs has site: 'https://yourusername.github.io' which is a placeholder that was never updated. If Astro uses this for canonical URLs or sitemap generation it will produce wrong output. Fix: update to the actual GitHub Pages URL for this project.

title: Replace hardcoded 2026 season year in index.astro heading
description:
src/pages/index.astro has a hardcoded

2026 Season

that requires a manual template change each year. pipeline/config.py correctly uses datetime.now().year. Fix: derive the year dynamically in the frontmatter: const SEASON_YEAR = new Date().getFullYear() and use {SEASON_YEAR} in the template.

value: Moto2/Moto3 use seed files in data/seed/. Race times are approx MotoGP-2h (Moto2) and MotoGP-4h (Moto3). Rebuild gold from all silver via: uv run python3 -c from pipeline.transforms.gold import build_calendar,build_upcoming then iterate SILVER_DIR/*.json

No framework islands — all client interactivity uses vanilla script tags. Pattern: init function called once on load + re-called on astro:after-swap for page transitions. EventModal uses CustomEvents (rt-open-event, rt-favs-changed) as cross-component bus.
Tailwind v4 does not support dynamic class names like bg-[#e10600] at runtime. Always use inline style= for dynamic series colors. Append hex opacity suffix e.g. color+'20' for ~12% tint.
upcoming.json is sorted by series not by date. Always sort by dateStart before applying per-series caps on the dashboard. Bug was fixed in index.astro — sortedUpcoming = [...upcoming].sort()

Favorites stored in localStorage key 'rt-favs' as JSON array of event IDs. EventModal and EventCard both sync via window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('rt-favs-changed')). Watchlist page re-renders from localStorage on that event.
Canonical session durations now live in src/lib/sessions.ts; use getSessionDurationMinutes() instead of redefining duration maps in UI helpers, ICS export, timelines, or kiosk logic.

LocalTime component requires data-local-time attribute NOT data-utc. Old EventCard used data-utc which was never read by the hydration script. Session times in EventCard now use data-local-time + data-format=time-short.
